prompt_md: Match each **SDLC task** on the left to the **model choice or trait** that best fits it on the right.

left: Generating a one-line commit message on every push (high volume, simple)
Reviewing an architecture proposal for hidden coupling and failure modes
Producing structured output where the same input must give the same result
A model recommending a framework method that no longer exists
Generating varied edge-case test inputs for a parsing function
right: Pick a small, fast, cheap model to keep per-call cost and latency low at scale
Reserve the largest, most capable model for this hard, open-ended reasoning task
Set a low temperature for focused, repeatable output
Add a human verification step, because the model can hallucinate confidently
Set a slightly higher temperature so suggestions are diverse rather than repetitive
